title: centaurea edith-mariae
intro: Centaurea edith-mariae, also known as Edith Maria's cornflower, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. This perennial plant is native to the Balkan Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea edith-mariae include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and aid in wound healing. Centaurea edith-mariae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
